# Pinned PyInstaller for CloudSaw's ScoutSuite freezing pipeline.
#
# Keep this pin separate from ScoutSuite's own requirements.txt so a
# PyInstaller bump is a deliberate change, reviewable in a PR, that
# doesn't ride along with an upstream ScoutSuite dependency pull.
#
# 6.11.x is the current stable line as of plan-authoring; bumping is
# fine as long as the spec's `Analysis(...)` and `EXE(...)` constructors
# still accept the same kwargs (the spec is the API boundary).
pyinstaller==6.11.0
